_publications._publicationTitle: Suggested response criteria for phase II antitumor drug studies for neurofibromatosis type 2 related vestibular schwannoma.

_contextSnippet: its measurement in relation to known NF2 VS natural history seems most secure. All patients enrolled in an NF2 VS trial would be expected to be eligible for volumetric response

details: Volumetric measurement in relation to known NF2 VS natural history is considered most secure, with all patients enrolled in NF2 VS trials expected to be eligible for volumetric response assessment
